## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, marketing initiatives, and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Siit experiencing a dip in trials, demos, and site traffic; exploring new content strategies and channels](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [GrowthX proposing overarching weekly campaigns, including blog posts, glossary terms, emails, and social content](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Comparative content and alternatives pages discussed as potential high-converting strategies](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Backlink opportunities and leveraging video content identified for improved SEO and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update and Content Strategy

  - [Siit seeing fewer trials, demos, and less traffic to sign-up/demo pages](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Possible seasonality effect with staggered spring breaks in the US](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [GrowthX proposing weekly themed campaigns with integrated content across blogs, glossary, emails, and social posts](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Focus on creating a wider net each week vs. isolated content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Buyer Research and Channel Insights

  - [IT professional interviewed highlighted G2 Crowd, Google research, and Reddit (r/sysadmin) as key information sources](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Consideration of paid G2 Crowd presence, despite reservations about cost and inflexibility](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Exploration of Reddit and Mac Admins Slack for content ideas and audience insights](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### Comparative Content Strategy

  - [Discussion on creating "alternatives" pages for competitors like Jira and FreshService](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Focus on highlighting Siit's strengths (e.g., native integrations, advanced AI) without direct competitor bashing](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Potential structure: longer-format page with conversion-optimized hero, checkerboard-style key sections, and FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Video Content Utilization

  - [Existing YouTube videos identified as potential content to leverage](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Strategies discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
    1.  Creating articles from video transcripts, especially for longer webinars
    2.  Linking videos within relevant blog posts to boost engagement
    3.  Developing new content ideas based on video topics not currently covered

### Backlinking and SEO

  - [GrowthX offered to test backlinking strategy using their client network](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Potential to improve SEO through strategic link exchanges with relevant partners](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Emphasis on brand mentions potentially benefiting ChatGPT visibility](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

### Email and Nurture Campaigns

  - [Identified underutilization of email nurture campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Suggestion to create monthly newsletters featuring top 5 performing content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
  - [Leveraging webinar content for email nurtures and on-demand viewing pages](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send meeting summary and this week's articles](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=2183.0)
  - [Carmel to send YouTube video links for content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=2178.0)
  - [Start testing backlinking strategy with GrowthX client network](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [Develop 10 new glossary terms next week](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
  - [Explore creation of alternatives/comparison pages for key competitors](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Investigate Reddit and Mac Admins Slack for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Consider implementing monthly newsletter with top-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/cED3j8kgx75QXGDHry7pQgyugCNJW2vo?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
